creator: murray@stokely.org
text:
This is one of the oldest open PRs in the database, but I think it
can finally be closed.  I can put a 1k group entry on my Solaris 8 NIS
server and use login just fine with FreeBSD 4.4.  Can we close this
pr?

$ ypcat group
...
